name: darkhunt
description: Darkhunt developer tools for Claude Code — skills for integrating Darkhunt LLM observability and security into your services.

plugins.name: darkhunt-telemetry
plugins.description: Integration playbook for the @darkhunt-security/telemetry SDK — wires LLM tracing, generations, and spans (with built-in secret/PII masking) into a Node/TypeScript service. Auto-invokes when you ask Claude to add Darkhunt telemetry / observability to a service.
